name: caching-spec
description: Quint formal model of the boxer versioned write-through cache design (public/caching + recordstore integration)

scripts.typecheck: for f in *.qnt; do quint typecheck "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test: for f in *.qnt; do quint test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.sweep: quint run versioned_cache.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=14 --max-samples=20000 && quint run freshness_ttl.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=14 --max-samples=20000
scripts.verify: quint verify versioned_cache.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=10 && quint verify freshness_ttl.qnt --invariant=Safety --max-steps=10
scripts.findings: quint run versioned_cache_unsafe_lww.qnt --invariant=MonotoneServe --max-steps=12 ; quint test versioned_cache_unsafe_nopin.qnt ; quint run freshness_ttl_unsafe.qnt --invariant=FreshnessHonest --max-steps=10
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run sweep
